ZypheroLab

Summary:
- ZypheroLab builds high-performance, conversion-focused websites for small and medium businesses.
- Core services: web design, technical SEO, AI-search optimization, conversion optimization.
- Primary market: Romania (RO), with Romanian-first content; English version at https://zypherolab.com/en/
- Typography is self-hosted (WOFF2); no third-party font CDN required for normal page loads.

Key facts:
- First functional site draft is often delivered in 3-5 business days (see on-page FAQ); fuller launches vary by scope.
- Focus metrics: qualified leads, conversion rate, Core Web Vitals, organic visibility.
- Contact paths: lead form on /#contact, WhatsApp +40 747 821 384 (links use https://wa.me/40747821384).

Implementation (for humans and coding assistants):
- Static HTML/CSS/JS; no build step. Optional extended notes may live in a local `docs/` folder (not published to the public repo). Root `AGENTS.md` in the repo is a short pointer only.

Canonical URL:
- https://zypherolab.com/

Primary sections:
- Hero: value proposition for business growth; CTA to live website simulator (#simulator).
- Services: web design, SEO+AI visibility, conversion architecture.
- Offer: starter package details.
- Results: case-study style outcomes.
- Simulator (#simulator): interactive “AI website generator” — business name, type, accent color, style; generates an in-page preview (no backend; client-side JS).
- FAQ: implementation timeline, AI-search visibility, post-launch support.
- Contact: lead qualification form (submits by opening WhatsApp with a prefilled message).
